__note_stuck: STUCK_TIME_REQUIRED means if ur position doesnt change in 10sec(dont change it to be lower than 10 sec) it will considered stuck and will try to unstuck
__note_webhook: WEBHOOK_URL will post the start and finished msg STUCK_WEBHOOK_URL will post only the stuck msg
__note_goldlimit: GOLD_LIMIT means it will scan your inv for how much gold you have so it can decide whether to send finish msg and stop picking up or not
